narrative:
West Chester Twp 43 (precinct in Butler County) has 894 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
